subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is imprisoned unto him who hath believed in God, the Powerful, the Single, the One, the Almighty, that he may rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله المقتدر الفرد الواحد القدیر لیفرح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
